name: Spicy Black-Eyed Peas (Great Cajun Dish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet and fry onion until golden.
2. Add garlic, green pepper, tumeric, and cayenne pepper and stir for 2-3 minutes.
3. Add tomato juice (or tomatoes) and cumin and cook for 5 minutes.
4. Add black-eyed peas and a little water if needed. Simmer for 15 minutes.
5. Stir in lemon juice. Serve over rice or couscous.
